scaleflow-automation-20260423-140730.source: LinkedIn Sales Navigator (search: marketing automation services)

painPoints: Currently using manual outreach processes that dont scale beyond 3 team members
Need integration between their existing CRM (HubSpot) and custom automation tools
Want to build an autonomous outbound system that can handle 1000+ prospects per month
Lacking expertise in AI-powered personalization at scale
Need help with deliverability optimization and spam compliance
scaleflow-automation-20260423-140730.outreachAngle: They explicitly need Outbound Autonomy expertise - perfect match for building scalable outbound systems. Can offer both the automation development and strategic consulting.
scaleflow-automation-20260423-140730.revenuePotential: Initial setup: $15K-25K, ongoing retainer: $3K-5K/month for maintenance and optimization

lastAction.notes: Personalized outreach email drafted highlighting Outbound Autonomy expertise for scaling their outbound sales efforts
